title: 9 Sins a Godly Man Excuses by Calling Them Something Else
caption:
Every sin has a nicer name. That's how it stays alive.

"I'm just efficient" is isolation with a badge on it. "I'm just observant" is pride with better lighting. "I'm just tired" has covered for laziness since Eden. The relabeling isn't an accident. It's how a man keeps living with what he'd never tolerate if he called it by its real name.

Scripture doesn't grade on the euphemism. It calls sin what it is and tells you to kill it, not manage it under a kinder title.

Nine excuses a godly man has to stop dressing up, before he starts believing his own cover story.

#faith #godlyman #christianmen #sin #selfawareness #discipleship #realtalk #manofgod
